projectDescription: Open-source subscription billing and payments platform with a comprehensive REST API for managing subscriptions, invoices, payments, and multi-tenant billing infrastructure.
keyFeatures: Subscription lifecycle management (create, change, cancel, pause/resume) with support for trials, add-ons, and plan changes
Automatic invoice generation based on subscription events, billing cycle day, and usage data
Plugin-based payment processing supporting authorize, capture, purchase, void, refund, and chargeback transactions
XML-driven versioned product catalog with support for recurring, fixed, and usage-based pricing
Overdue state machine for configurable dunning and collections workflows
Full multi-tenancy with per-tenant catalog, overdue config, payment state machines, and plugin configurations
Usage-based (metered) billing with flexible tiered pricing blocks
Comprehensive audit logging and history for every entity change
RBAC security with Apache Shiro supporting JDBC, LDAP, Okta, and Auth0
OSGI plugin system for payment gateways, catalog providers, tax, invoice, and notification integrations
Hosted Payment Page (HPP) support for redirecting customers to gateway payment forms
Parent-child account hierarchy for hierarchical billing and credit transfer
publicApiSurface: GET/POST /1.0/kb/payments — payment processing (authorize, capture, refund, void, chargeback)
POST /1.0/kb/paymentGateways/hosted/form — hosted payment page form descriptor
GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /1.0/kb/security — RBAC user and role management
GET/POST/DELETE /1.0/kb/customFields — custom metadata on any entity
GET/PUT /1.0/kb/admin — admin operations (cache, payment state fix, healthcheck)
GET/POST /1.0/kb/nodesInfo — cluster node and plugin management
